title: Senior Radiologist at AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions:
AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
